initial_candidates.sql:
WITH driver_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        MAX(ds.points) AS max_driver_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
    JOIN drivers d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
    GROUP BY r.year, d.forename, d.surname
),
constructor_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        c.name,
        MAX(cs.points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN constructor_standings cs ON r.race_id = cs.race_id
    JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    GROUP BY r.year, c.name
),
driver_top AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        forename,
        surname,
        max_driver_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_driver_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM driver_max_points
),
constructor_top AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        name,
        max_constructor_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_constructor_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM constructor_max_points
)
SELECT 
    dt.year,
    dt.forename || ' ' || dt.surname AS driver_name,
    ct.name AS constructor_name
FROM driver_top dt
JOIN constructor_top ct ON dt.year = ct.year AND dt.rn = 1 AND ct.rn = 1
ORDER BY dt.year;

WITH driver_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        MAX(ds.points) AS max_driver_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
    JOIN drivers d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
    GROUP BY r.year, d.forename, d.surname
),
driver_top_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        forename,
        surname,
        max_driver_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_driver_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM driver_max_points
),
constructor_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        MAX(cs.points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN constructor_standings cs ON r.race_id = cs.race_id
    JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    GROUP BY r.year, c.name
),
constructor_top_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        constructor_name,
        max_constructor_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_constructor_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM constructor_max_points
)
SELECT 
    d.year,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_full_name,
    c.constructor_name
FROM driver_top_per_year d
JOIN constructor_top_per_year c ON d.year = c.year
WHERE d.rn = 1 AND c.rn = 1
ORDER BY d.year;

WITH driver_max_points AS (
  SELECT 
    r.year,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_driver_points
  FROM races r
  JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
  JOIN drivers d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
  GROUP BY r.year, d.forename, d.surname
),
constructor_max_points AS (
  SELECT 
    r.year,
    c.name AS constructor_name,
    MAX(cs.points) AS max_constructor_points
  FROM races r
  JOIN constructor_standings cs ON r.race_id = cs.race_id
  JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
  GROUP BY r.year, c.name
),
yearly_driver_top AS (
  SELECT 
    year,
    forename,
    surname,
    max_driver_points,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_driver_points DESC) AS rn
  FROM driver_max_points
),
yearly_constructor_top AS (
  SELECT 
    year,
    constructor_name,
    max_constructor_points,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY max_constructor_points DESC) AS rn
  FROM constructor_max_points
)
SELECT 
  dt.year,
  dt.forename || ' ' || dt.surname AS driver_full_name,
  ct.constructor_name
FROM yearly_driver_top dt
JOIN yearly_constructor_top ct ON dt.year = ct.year
WHERE dt.rn = 1 AND ct.rn = 1
ORDER BY dt.year;
